0.ai_notes: 'Here's why': a common way to introduce an explanation for something.
0.remarks: 'Here's why': 常用于引出对某事的原因解释。

1.original: In the long, long history of humankind, a speaking language, even remotely resembling what we use today,
1.b1: In human history, a spoken language that is similar to what we use today
1.cn: 在漫长的人类历史中，与我们今天使用的语言相似的口语，
1.ai_notes: 'remotely resembling': looking or being somewhat similar to something else.
1.remarks: 'remotely resembling': 看起来或表现得与某物有几分相似。

2.cn: 是一个非常近期的发明。
2.ai_notes: 'recent invention': something that was created only a short time ago.
2.remarks: 'recent invention': 指不久前才被创造出来的事物。

3.original: So recent, you might say, in terms of the great clock of time,
3.b1: It is so new that, if we look at the history of time,
3.cn: 如果从时间的长河来看，它出现得如此之晚，
3.ai_notes: 'in terms of': when considering a specific subject or perspective. 'the great clock of time': a metaphor for the entire history of the world.
3.remarks:
'in terms of': 在考虑特定主题或角度时使用。
'the great clock of time': 隐喻整个世界历史的长河。

4.original: that we developed a language only this morning.
4.b1: it is like we only started using language this morning.
4.cn: 以至于可以说我们今天早上才发明了语言。
4.ai_notes: 'developed': to grow or create something over a period of time.
4.remarks: 'developed': 指经过一段时间的积累而成长或创造出来。

5.original: For millions and millions of years, people got by with little more than moans and groans and grunts and growls.
5.b1: For millions of years, people only used simple sounds like moans and grunts to communicate.
5.cn: 几百万年来，人们主要靠呻吟、咕哝和咆哮等简单的声音来交流。
5.ai_notes: 'got by': managed to survive or deal with a situation. 'moans and groans and grunts and growls': different types of low, simple sounds made by the throat.
5.remarks:
'got by': 设法生存或应付某种局面。
'moans and groans and grunts and growls': 指喉咙发出的各种低沉、简单的声音。

6.original: So for millions of years, people communicated with other people by body and facial expressions and sounds, not words.
6.b1: So for a long time, people used body language, facial expressions, and sounds instead of words.
6.cn: 所以几百万年来，人们通过肢体语言、面部表情和声音，而不是文字来进行交流。
6.ai_notes: 'communicated': shared information or feelings with others.
6.remarks: 'communicated': 与他人分享信息或情感。

7.original: And we still communicate our attitudes, our feelings toward people and things the same way.
7.b1: We still show our feelings and attitudes toward others in the same way.
7.cn: 我们现在依然用同样的方式表达对他人的态度和情感。
7.ai_notes: 'attitudes': the way you think and feel about someone or something.
7.remarks: 'attitudes': 指你对某人或某事的看法和感受。

8.original: Aside from direct body contact, body movements, facial expressions and sound are the only ways we have to communicate with infants.
8.b1: Besides touching, body movements, facial expressions, and sounds are the only ways we communicate with babies.
8.cn: 除了直接的身体接触，肢体动作、面部表情和声音是我们与婴儿交流的唯一方式。
8.ai_notes: 'aside from': except for or in addition to. 'infants': very young babies.
8.remarks:
'aside from': 除了……之外。
'infants': 指非常年幼的婴儿。

9.original: And those young ones show an uncanny ability to spot the phony.
9.b1: And babies are very good at knowing when someone is not being honest.
9.cn: 而这些小家伙们有一种不可思议的能力，能看出谁在伪装。
9.ai_notes: 'uncanny': strange, mysterious, or surprisingly accurate. 'phony': a person who is not honest or is pretending to be someone they are not.
9.remarks:
'uncanny': 奇怪、神秘或出奇地准确。
'phony': 指不诚实或伪装自己的人。

10.original: Professor Erwin H. Schell, one of America's most respected authorities on leadership,
10.b1: Professor Erwin H. Schell, a famous expert on leadership,
10.cn: 欧文·H·谢尔教授是美国最受尊敬的领导力权威之一，
10.ai_notes: 'authorities': people who are considered experts in a specific field.
10.remarks: 'authorities': 指在特定领域被公认的专家或权威人士。

11.original: says, Obviously, there is something more than facilities and competence that makes for accomplishment.
11.b1: says that success comes from more than just skills and tools.
11.cn: 他说，显然，除了设施和能力之外，还有其他因素能带来成就。
11.ai_notes: 'facilities': the buildings, equipment, or services provided for a purpose. 'competence': the ability to do something well. 'makes for': results in or causes.
11.remarks:
'facilities': 为特定目的提供的建筑、设备或服务。
'competence': 做事的能力。
'makes for': 导致或产生某种结果。

12.original: I have come to believe that this linkage factor, this catalyst, if you will,
12.cn: 我开始相信，这个连接因素，或者说是催化剂，
12.ai_notes: 'linkage factor': a quality that connects different things together. 'catalyst': something that causes a change or makes a process happen faster. 'if you will': a phrase used to suggest a way of describing something.
12.remarks:
'linkage factor': 连接不同事物的特质。
'catalyst': 促使变化或加速过程的事物。
'if you will': 用于建议一种描述方式的礼貌用语。

13.original: can be defined in a single word—attitude.
13.b1: can be described with one word: attitude.
13.cn: 可以用一个词来定义——态度。
13.ai_notes: 'defined': explained the meaning of a word or concept.
13.remarks: 'defined': 对词语或概念的含义进行解释。

14.original: When our attitude is right, our abilities reach a maximum of effectiveness, and good results inevitably follow.
14.b1: When we have a good attitude, we work better, and we get good results.
14.cn: 当我们的态度端正时，我们的能力就能发挥到极致，好的结果也会随之而来。
14.ai_notes: 'maximum of effectiveness': the highest possible level of success. 'inevitably': something that is certain to happen.
14.remarks:
'maximum of effectiveness': 最高程度的有效性。
'inevitably': 不可避免地，注定会发生。

15.b1: Attitude is what makes the difference.
15.ai_notes: 'make the difference': to have a significant effect on the outcome of a situation.
15.remarks: 'make the difference': 对事情的结果产生重大影响。

16.original: Salesmen with the right attitude beat their quotas.
16.b1: Salespeople with a good attitude reach their sales goals.
16.cn: 态度端正的销售人员能超额完成任务。
16.ai_notes: 'beat their quotas': to exceed the sales goals that were set for them.
16.remarks: 'beat their quotas': 超过预设的销售目标或配额。

17.original: Students with the right attitude make A's.
17.b1: Students with a good attitude get the best grades.
17.cn: 态度端正的学生能拿到优异的成绩。
17.ai_notes: 'make A's': to receive the highest grade in a class.
17.remarks: 'make A's': 在课程中获得最高等级（A等）的成绩。

18.original: Right attitudes pave the way to really happy married life.
18.b1: A good attitude helps create a happy marriage.
18.cn: 端正的态度为幸福的婚姻生活铺平了道路。
18.ai_notes: 'pave the way': to make it easier for something to happen or develop in the future.
18.remarks: 'pave the way': 为未来某事的发生或发展铺平道路。

19.original: Right attitudes make you effective in dealing with people, enable you to develop as a leader.
19.b1: A good attitude helps you work well with others and become a leader.
19.cn: 端正的态度能让你在与人相处时更有效率，并助你成长为一名领导者。
19.ai_notes: 'dealing with': interacting or managing relationships with other people.
19.remarks: 'dealing with': 与他人互动或处理人际关系。

20.original: Right attitudes win for you in every situation.
20.b1: A good attitude helps you succeed in every situation.
20.cn: 端正的态度能让你在任何情况下都获得成功。
20.ai_notes: 'win for you': to help you achieve success or a positive result.
20.remarks: 'win for you': 帮助你获得成功或积极的结果。

21.ai_notes: 'grow': in this context, it means to develop or cultivate a personal quality.
21.remarks: 'grow': 在此语境下指培养或发展某种个人品质。
